title: dactylorhiza ochroleuca
intro: Dactylorhiza ochroleuca, also known as the pale marsh orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza ochroleuca include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Dactylorhiza ochroleuca can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
